text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where systems improve by analyzing data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning, a more advanced type of machine learning, uses neural networks to recognize complex patterns, like in images or speech. Today, AI is part of daily life. For example, it powers virtual assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming platforms, and helps self-driving cars navigate roads. While AI offers great benefits, it also raises questions about privacy and jobs.
